ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., Random Forest, Gradient Boosting) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for this iteration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the iteration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the iteration ended */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "is_baseline" INTEGER /* Indicates if this iteration is a baseline for comparison */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, logloss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is a primary metric for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration this value belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "use_weights" INTEGER /* Whether weights were used to calculate this value */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration when the metric was measured */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this weight belongs to */,
  "weight_file" TEXT /* File path to the weight file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the weight was uploaded */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of weight file (e.g., final, checkpoint) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the weight file in bytes */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary weight file for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_weights_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date this version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "is_baseline" INTEGER /* Indicates if this version is a baseline for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, model developer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations_users" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the iteration (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_users" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the model (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions_users" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the version (e.g., creator, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_weights_users" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the weight file (e.g., uploader, validator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id", "user_id")
)
